set.body: pkgdown workflow succeeded for commit 9aed9b863108e0e875050e49796c0688d4844c84 and origin/gh-pages exists at 34d5dbe9f4923b1ac9b639f1056b15e5f259b521. Pages API currently has no configured site or is inaccessible; GET repos/:owner/:repo/pages returned 404 and attempted POST gh api --method POST repos/:owner/:repo/pages -f source[branch]=gh-pages -f source[path]=/ failed with HTTP 401 Requires authentication because local gh token is invalid. After gh auth login, run the POST or configure Settings > Pages to deploy from branch gh-pages path /, then verify the pkgdown site serves.
set.title: Enable GitHub Pages from gh-pages after gh auth is restored
